title: Write a channel test that joins, sends a message, asserts a broadcast
prompt: Write `test/my_app_web/channels/room_channel_test.exs` that: (1) `use MyAppWeb.ChannelCase, async: true`, (2) connects via `{:ok, _, socket} = MyAppWeb.UserSocket |> socket("user_id", %{user_id: user.id}) |> subscribe_and_join(MyAppWeb.RoomChannel, "room:lobby")`, (3) pushes a `"new_msg"` event with `%{"body" => "hello"}`, (4) asserts broadcast with `assert_broadcast "new_msg", %{body: "hello"}`. Must include sandbox allowance setup (the channel needs the test's sandbox allowance propagated via socket.assigns.phoenix_ecto_sandbox).
tier_rationale: Full channel test requiring knowledge of subscribe_and_join, push, assert_broadcast AND sandbox propagation.
